title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at ITC Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at ITC Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
